privileged_info_summary: The Oswego dataset documents a real 1940 gastrointestinal illness outbreak investigation in Oswego County, New York. On April 18, 1940, 80 persons attended a church supper; Dr. A. M. Rubin completed interviews with 75 of these attendees, of whom 46 reported acute gastrointestinal illness. The resulting Oswego dataset with 75 records is a classic epidemiological training dataset available in Epi Info 7 (stored in Sample.prj) and R packages (epitools, epiDisplay). Participants ranged in age from 9 to 77 years. The task requires agents to recode the continuous Age variable into four categorical age groups (0-19, 20-39, 40-59, 60+), aggregate case counts by AgeGroup and Ill status, and export the summary table to CSV format.
